performanceNotifications.title: Individual Selling Plan Reminder
performanceNotifications.message: You are on the Individual selling plan. A $0.99 per-item fee applies to each unit sold. Switch to Professional if you plan to sell more than 40 items a month.

performanceNotifications.title: Confirm Shipment Reminder
performanceNotifications.message: Please confirm shipment and add tracking for order 111-2048573-6610044 by the expected ship date to keep your metrics healthy.

performanceNotifications.title: Used Item Condition Guidelines
performanceNotifications.message: Your listings are in Used condition. Make sure the condition notes accurately describe wear so buyers know what to expect.
